title: Deck-sweep arc: 5-wave portfolio cleanup sequencing
description: Parent deliverable for a 5-wave portfolio sweep clearing CI debt, establishing deprecation infrastructure, and landing tooling subcommands. Wave 1 (roadmap-validate venture-summary optional) merged closed-with-debt; spike on roadmap-business.json baseline drift terminated COLLAPSE-AND-RESUME into d-timeline-fix family which closed 4/11 timeline-class failures. Wave 2 establishes ground-truth preservation foundation. Waves 3-5 deliver tooling, tangential cleanups, and long-tail drift batch.

outputs.description: Wave 1 — Unblock CI: roadmap-validate venture-summary optional (1 deliverable). Status: MERGED 2026-06-01 closed-with-debt.
acceptanceCriteria: EB CI no longer fails on venture-summary check after pin bump to @v4

outputs.description: Wave 2 — Ground-truth preservation foundation (4 deliverables): deprecation header convention, canonical schema authoring for EB drift, archive directory infrastructure, portfolio venture-summary archival.
Wave 3 — luhtech-schema tooling subcommands + MCP-readiness (3 deliverables): deprecate subcommand, fu+validate-instance subcommands, mcp-serve.
Wave 4 — Tangential cleanup (3 deliverables, interleaved): CI workflow registry rename, CIS cost tools BW UUID, draft-2020-12 violations.
acceptanceCriteria: 3 tangential-cleanup deliverables authored and reach S7-merged

outputs.description: Wave 5 — Long-tail drift batch (1 deliverable): ground-truth-drift-batch covering ~24 unblocked parallelizable FUs, executed after Wave 2 deprecation convention is enforced.

preMerge: All 13 child deliverables authored and validated against deliverable.schema.json v1.0.0
Each wave reaches S7-merged before next wave's first deliverable enters S5
Exceptions: Wave 1 spike (collapse-and-resume) and d-timeline-fix family are recorded as in-arc deviations, not arc deviations
postMerge: Portfolio CI debt cleared per per-deliverable acceptance criteria
luhtech-schema CLI at functional parity for deprecate/fu/validate-instance/mcp-serve

transitions.trigger: Arc spec authored in prior session; instance landing today
Wave 1 already executed and merged closed-with-debt; d-timeline-fix family merged; Wave 2 starting

notes: 5-wave portfolio sweep. Wave 1 already merged closed-with-debt 2026-06-01. d-timeline-fix family (parent + 4 children) merged 2026-06-01 as collapse-and-resume terminal of spike-2026-06-01-roadmap-business-baseline-drift. Wave 2 starts now with 4 children authored at S4 alongside this parent. Waves 3-5 remain to be specified as child instances. Total deliverables under arc: ~13 (1 Wave 1 + 1 d-timeline-fix parent + 4 d-timeline-fix children + 4 Wave 2 + 3 Wave 3 + 3 Wave 4 + 1 Wave 5).
